title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSDL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at NSDL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at NSDL are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About NSDL:
NSDL is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSDL!
